title: アオハル杯5戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon and her team come together to
overcome the target times Ms. Kashimoto set for
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, it's time for round five of the Unity Cup!
The day of the final showdown against Team
Zenith has come at long last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Team Zenith's overwhelming presence,
Taiki Shuttle and the others are undaunted and
determined to win. The races are about to begin...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team pumps itself up with a rowdy cheer.
Happy Hoppers, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team pumps itself up with a rowdy cheer.
Sunny Runners, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team pumps itself up with a rowdy cheer.
Carrot Pudding, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team pumps itself up with a rowdy cheer. Blue
Bloom, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team pumps itself up with a rowdy cheer.
Team Carrot, let's go!
